utility_evaluation.REASONING:
There are 5 items requested in the required format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. All 5 appear in the final coverage plan. Now check if each is fully specified with all required details:
- health_coverage: The format requires physical and mental health insurance with costs. Plan provides physical health (LifeFirst for Raj €100/month; SecureLife for children €100/month total), mental health (HealthFirst €60/month), plus an executive health package (€300/month) and a total monthly cost (€560). This satisfies the requirement with costs.
- property_coverage: The format requires home/contents insurance with costs. Plan lists home_content (VitalPlus €60/month), technology_protection add-on (€35/month), and a total monthly cost (€95). This satisfies the requirement with costs.
- travel_coverage: The format requires travel insurance with costs. Plan lists standard_travel (€55/month), adventure_travel (€50/month), and total monthly cost (€105). This satisfies the requirement with costs.
- additional_services: The format requires any enhancement services with costs. Plan lists executive_health_package (€300/month with description), technology_protection (€35/month with description), and a rate_protection_guarantee (benefit without a cost). Since the item asks for 'any enhancement services with costs', at least some are provided with costs; presence of a no-cost item does not negate completeness. Considered sufficiently specified.
- total_budget: The format requires complete monthly/annual cost breakdown. Plan provides monthly_cost (€760), annual_cost (€9,120), and additional savings metrics. This satisfies the requirement.
All 5 items are present and adequately specified per the requested details.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: Extract items named in the final coverage plan and match them to identical names in the ground-truth lists. Mappings found: LifeFirst Standard Plan (physical health) exists under primary_health_coverage.physical_health with rating 8. SecureLife Basic Plan for children corresponds to SecureLife Basic Plan under primary_health_coverage.physical_health with rating 2. HealthFirst Standard Plan (mental health) exists under primary_health_coverage.mental_health with rating 6. Family Executive Health Package is not present verbatim; closest is Preventive Care Package and Specialist Access, but since exact match is required, no rating mapped. VitalPlus Standard Coverage (home content) matches property_protection.home_content.VitalPlus Standard Coverage with rating 6. Technology Protection Add-on corresponds to Technology Protection under property_enhancement_services with rating 10. TravelFirst Standard Plan matches mobility_coverage.travel_insurance.TravelFirst Standard Plan with rating 8. Adventure Travel Coverage matches travel_enhancement_services.Adventure Travel Coverage with rating 8.
